name: Light Bringer
description: Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You learn the Light spell and can cast it without material components. If you already know it, you learn a different Cleric cantrip. Once per long rest, the light from your Light spell can be sunlight. As a bonus action while in sunlight, you can expend one Hit Die to regain hit points equal to the roll (once per short or long rest).

mechanics.note: Only if Light is already known
